mapper.sql: cd.employee_id, cd.enabled_flag, cd.type, cd.year, cd.dept, cd.department, cd.team, cd.job, cd.cost_center_num as cost_center_num, cd.status, cd.export_flag, isnull(cd.suit1, 0) as suit1, isnull(cd.suit2, 0) as suit2, isnull(cd.suit3, 0) as suit3, isnull(cd.suit4, 0) as suit4,isnull(cd.family_clothing1,0) as family_clothing1, isnull(cd.family_clothing2,0) as family_clothing2, isnull(cd.family_clothing3, 0) as family_clothing3, isnull(cd.family_clothing4, 0) as family_clothing4, isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes1, 0) as summer_working_clothes1, isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes2, 0) as summer_working_clothes2, isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes3, 0) as summer_working_clothes3, isnull(cd.winter_working_clothes1, 0) as winter_working_clothes1, isnull(cd.winter_working_clothes2, 0) as winter_working_clothes2, isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing1, 0) as post_sale_clothing1, isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing2, 0) as post_sale_clothing2, isnull( cd.post_sale_clothing3, 0) as post_sale_clothing3, isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing4, 0) as post_sale_clothing4, isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing5, 0) as post_sale_clothing5, isnull(cd.dining_clothes1, 0) as dining_clothes1, isnull(cd.dining_clothes2, 0) as dining_clothes2, isnull(cd.security_clothes1, 0) as security_clothes1, isnull(cd.security_clothes2, 0) as security_clothes2, isnull(cd.security_clothes3, 0) as security_clothes3, isnull(cd.security_clothes4, 0) as security_clothes4, cd.id, cd.attribute2, cd.attribute3, cd.attribute1, cd.attribute4, cd.update_time, cd.create_time, cd.update_by, cd.create_by, 0 as remove_prop_flag

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.dept as ${tAlias}_dept, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.job as ${tAlias}_job, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.status as ${tAlias}_status, ${tAlias}.export_flag as ${tAlias}_export_flag, ${tAlias}.suit1 as ${tAlias}_suit1, ${tAlias}.suit2 as ${tAlias}_suit2, ${tAlias}.suit3 as ${tAlias}_suit3, ${tAlias}.suit4 as ${tAlias}_suit4, ${tAlias}.family_clothing1 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing1, ${tAlias}.family_clothing2 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing2, ${tAlias}.family_clothing3 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing3, ${tAlias}.family_clothing4 as ${tAlias}_family_clothing4, ${tAlias}.summer_working_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_summer_working_clothes1, ${tAlias}.summer_working_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_summer_working_clothes2, ${tAlias}.summer_working_clothes3 as ${tAlias}_summer_working_clothes3, ${tAlias}.winter_working_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_winter_working_clothes1, ${tAlias}.winter_working_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_winter_working_clothes2, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing1 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing1, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing2 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing2, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing3 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing3, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing4 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing4, ${tAlias}.post_sale_clothing5 as ${tAlias}_post_sale_clothing5, ${tAlias}.dining_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_dining_clothes1, ${tAlias}.dining_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_dining_clothes2, ${tAlias}.security_clothes1 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes1, ${tAlias}.security_clothes2 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes2, ${tAlias}.security_clothes3 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes3, ${tAlias}.security_clothes4 as ${tAlias}_security_clothes4, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, 0 as ${tAlias}_remove_prop_flag

select
,pe.name, pe.gender, pe.work_card, case when exists (select 1 from cm_detail_history cdh where cdh.detail_id = cd.id) then 1 else 0 end as history_flag, case when (EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej where pe.id = pej.employee_id AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.job_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT admin_job_id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.enabled_flag = 1 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 ) ) or (EXISTS (select 1 from fnd_user fu join fnd_users_roles fur on fu.id = fur.user_id and enabled_flag = 1 join fnd_role fr on fr.id = fur.role_id and fr.permission = 'suntenManager' where fu.employee_id = pe.id)) ) then 1 else 0 end as leader_flag from cm_detail cd join pm_employee pe on pe.id = cd.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into cm_detail (employee_id, enabled_flag, type, year, dept, department, team, job, cost_center_num, status, export_flag, suit1, suit2, suit3, suit4, family_clothing1, family_clothing2, family_clothing3, family_clothing4, summer_working_clothes1, summer_working_clothes2, summer_working_clothes3, winter_working_clothes1, winter_working_clothes2, post_sale_clothing1, post_sale_clothing2, post_sale_clothing3, post_sale_clothing4, post_sale_clothing5, dining_clothes1, dining_clothes2, security_clothes1,security_clothes2, security_clothes3,security_clothes4, attribute2, attribute3, attribute1, attribute4, update_time, create_time, update_by, create_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exportFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{suit1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{suit2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{suit3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{suit4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{familyClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summerWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summerWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summerWorkingClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{winterWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{winterWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postSaleClothing5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diningClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diningClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{securityClothes4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update cm_detail set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept = #{dept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, export_flag = #{exportFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, suit1 = #{suit1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, suit2 = #{suit2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, suit3 = #{suit3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, suit4 = #{suit4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing1 = #{familyClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing2 = #{familyClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing3 = #{familyClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, family_clothing4 = #{familyClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, summer_working_clothes1 = #{summerWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, summer_working_clothes2 = #{summerWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, summer_working_clothes3 = #{summerWorkingClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, winter_working_clothes1 = #{winterWorkingClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, winter_working_clothes2 = #{winterWorkingClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing1 = #{postSaleClothing1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing2 = #{postSaleClothing2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing3 = #{postSaleClothing3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing4 = #{postSaleClothing4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_sale_clothing5 = #{postSaleClothing5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dining_clothes1 = #{diningClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dining_clothes2 = #{diningClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes1 = #{securityClothes1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes2 = #{securityClothes2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes3 = #{securityClothes3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, security_clothes4 = #{securityClothes4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pe.name,pe.work_card, cd.year, cd.department, cd.dept, cd.team, cd.job, cd.cost_center_num, case when sum(isnull(cd.suit1, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.suit1, 0)) end as suit1, case when sum(isnull(cd.suit2, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.suit2, 0)) end as suit2, case when sum(isnull(cd.suit3, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.suit3, 0)) end as suit3, case when sum(isnull(cd.suit4, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.suit4, 0)) end as suit4, case when sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing1,0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing1,0)) end as family_clothing1, case when sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing2,0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing2,0)) end as family_clothing2, case when sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing3, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing3, 0)) end as family_clothing3, case when sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing4, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.family_clothing4, 0)) end as family_clothing4, case when sum(isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes1, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes1, 0)) end as summer_working_clothes1, case when sum(isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes2, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes2, 0)) end as summer_working_clothes2, case when sum(isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes3, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.summer_working_clothes3, 0)) end as summer_working_clothes3, case when sum(isnull(cd.winter_working_clothes1, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.winter_working_clothes1, 0)) end as winter_working_clothes1, case when sum(isnull(cd.winter_working_clothes2, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.winter_working_clothes2, 0)) end as winter_working_clothes2, case when sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing1, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing1, 0)) end as post_sale_clothing1, case when sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing2, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing2, 0)) end as post_sale_clothing2, case when sum(isnull( cd.post_sale_clothing3, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull( cd.post_sale_clothing3, 0)) end as post_sale_clothing3, case when sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing4, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing4, 0)) end as post_sale_clothing4, case when sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing5, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.post_sale_clothing5, 0)) end as post_sale_clothing5, case when sum(isnull(cd.dining_clothes1, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.dining_clothes1, 0)) end as dining_clothes1, case when sum(isnull(cd.dining_clothes2, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.dining_clothes2, 0)) end as dining_clothes2, case when sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes1, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes1, 0)) end as security_clothes1, case when sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes2, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes2, 0)) end as security_clothes2, case when sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes3, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes3, 0)) end as security_clothes3, case when sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes4, 0)) = 0 then null else sum(isnull(cd.security_clothes4, 0)) end as security_clothes4 from cm_detail cd join pm_employee pe on pe.id = cd.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and cd.enabled_flag = 1 where cd.year = year(getdate()) group by pe.name,pe.work_card, cd.year, cd.department, cd.dept, cd.team, cd.job, cd.cost_center_num order by pe.work_card
mapper.update: update cd set status = 'complete', export_flag = 1 , update_time = getdate(), update_by = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} from cm_detail cd where cd.status = 'pass' and cd.export_flag = 0 and cd.year = year(getdate())
mapper.select: order by dept DESC, department DESC, team DESC,pe.work_card
mapper.update: update cm_detail set enabled_flag = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
